INVOKE.COMMENT: ===Get Start Time and set error message for DB logging===

Values.value: GLDExpressGateway: Invalid XML - Sent ACK with errors to client

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

Values.value: %service% is not a standard request from EFW. So, the request is failed.

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

INVOKE.COMMENT: Determine if this service should log data

Values.value: The xml sent to EFW from LXI: %xmldata%
Sent the reply back to EFW..

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails
